description: Refactor the Dockerized Nginx proxy setup at /home/ga/proxy-refactor/ to use dynamic configuration. Replace the hardcoded upstream URL in the Nginx configuration with the ${BACKEND_URL} environment variable and utilize the official Nginx image's template feature for configuration deployment. Update the docker-compose.yml to mount the template correctly and pass BACKEND_URL=http://backend:8080 to the proxy service so that curl http://localhost successfully returns the backend response.
